---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Davood Tofighi"
---

::: {.bio-section}

![](assets/profile-placeholder.svg){.bio-photo}

::: {.bio-text}
# Davood Tofighi, Ph.D.

[Associate Professor · [Department of Mathematics & Statistics](https://math.unm.edu)]{.subtitle}

[University of New Mexico](https://math.unm.edu/people/academic-personnel/davood-tofighi){.institution}

[Causal inference · Mediation analysis · Statistical methodology · Health data science]{.tagline}
:::

<div class="dag-accent" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg width="140" height="90" viewBox="0 0 140 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <line x1="20" y1="70" x2="70" y2="20" class="dag-edge"/>
    <line x1="70" y1="20" x2="120" y2="70" class="dag-edge"/>
    <line x1="20" y1="70" x2="120" y2="70" class="dag-edge dag-edge-direct"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="70" r="9" class="dag-node dag-node-x"/>
    <text x="20" y="74" text-anchor="middle" class="dag-label">X</text>
    <circle cx="70" cy="20" r="9" class="dag-node dag-node-m"/>
    <text x="70" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="dag-label">M</text>
    <circle cx="120" cy="70" r="9" class="dag-node dag-node-y"/>
    <text x="120" y="74" text-anchor="middle" class="dag-label">Y</text>
  </svg>
</div>

:::

::: {.highlight-box}
I develop and evaluate statistical methodologies that enhance the **robustness of statistical inferences**. My work focuses on causal inference, DAG-based mediation analysis, sensitivity analysis, and the application of machine learning to health data.
:::

## Research Focus

My research centers on developing methods that amplify the **replicability of statistical methods** in educational, health, and prevention science. I'm particularly interested in:

- **Causal mediation analysis** using directed acyclic graphs (DAGs)
- **Sensitivity analysis** — statistical and Monte Carlo approaches
- **Generalized linear mixed-effects models**
- **Multivariate statistics** and categorical data analysis
- **Machine learning** applications in health research

::: {.quick-links}
[<i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Research](research.qmd)
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> Software](software.qmd)
[<i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications](publications.qmd)
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Teaching](teaching.qmd)
[<i class="bi bi-bank"></i> UNM Profile](https://math.unm.edu/people/academic-personnel/davood-tofighi)
:::

## Applied Research

Beyond methodology, I collaborate on substantive research including:

- **Drug delivery optimization** for cancer and COVID-19 research
- **Prevention science** interventions
- **Health outcomes** research

## Professional Service

**Associate Editor** — Quantitative Psychology and Measurement section, *Frontiers in Psychology*

## Funding Support

Research supported by **NASA**, **NSF**, and **NIH**.

## Featured Software

### mediationverse

A unified R ecosystem for mediation analysis — model fitting, effect sizes, confidence intervals, sensitivity analysis, and simulation tools.

```r
# Install the ecosystem
pak::pak("data-wise/mediationverse")
```

[→ Learn more about mediationverse](software.qmd)

## Contact

<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> <a href="#" id="email-link">Enable JavaScript to see email</a><br>
<i class="bi bi-building"></i> Office: SMLC 228

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var el = document.getElementById('email-link');
  var u = 'dtofighi';
  var d = 'unm.edu';
  el.href = 'mailto:' + u + '@' + d;
  el.textContent = u + '@' + d;
});
</script>

## Profiles

[![Google Scholar](https://img.shields.io/badge/Google%20Scholar-4285F4?style=flat&logo=google-scholar&logoColor=white)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hzQ60YcAAAAJ)
[![ORCID](https://img.shields.io/badge/ORCID-A6CE39?style=flat&logo=orcid&logoColor=white)](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8523-7776)
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-181717?style=flat&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Data-Wise)
[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0A66C2?style=flat&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/davood-tofighi-b6176ab8/)
